resume.hi-IN: Lagta hai pichhli baar call beech mein cut ho gayi thi. Koi baat nahi — chaliye wahin se aage badhte hain?
resume.ta-IN: Munadi azhaippu naduvil thunindhuduthu pola. Paravaayilla — angirundhe thodarvomaa?
resume.bn-IN: Mone hocche aager call-ta majhkhane kete giyechilo. Kono byapaar na — cholun oikhan thekei egiye jaai?
resume.te-IN: Mundu call madhyalo cut ayinattu undi. Pravaledu — akkadi nundi konasaagudaamaa?
resume.gu-IN: Em lage chhe ke aagli vakhat call vacche kapaai gayo hato. Vandho nahi — chalo tyaathij aage vadhiye?
resume.kn-IN: Hinde nimma call naduvalli cut aaytu anisutte. Paravagilla — alli inda munduvariyona?
resume.ml-IN: Munpathe call idakku murinjathaayi thonnunnu. Kuzhappamilla — avidunnu thanne thudaraam?
resume.mr-IN: Maglchya veli call madhech tutla asel. Harkat nahi — chala tithunach pudhe jaau?
resume.pa-IN: Lagda hai pichhli vaar call vichkaar kat gaya si. Koi gall nahi — chalo otho hi aage chaliye?
resume.od-IN: Aagaru call majhire kati jaaithila bhali laguchhi. Kichhi katha nuhe — chaalantu seithi ru aage baadhiba?
resume.en-IN: Looks like our last call dropped midway. No worries — shall we pick up right where we left off?

default_welcome.hi-IN: Namaste! Main Vaidya hoon, aapki madad ke liye haazir. Boliye, main kaise madad karoon?
default_welcome.ta-IN: Vanakkam! Naan Vaidya, ungalukku udhava ingeye irukkiren. Sollunga, naan eppadi udhava mudiyum?
default_welcome.bn-IN: Namaskar! Ami Vaidya, apnake sahajyo korte ekhanei achi. Bolun, ami kibhabe sahajyo korte pari?
default_welcome.te-IN: Namaskaram! Nenu Vaidya, mee sahayam kosam ikkade unnanu. Cheppandi, nenu ela sahayam cheyagalanu?
default_welcome.gu-IN: Namaste! Hu Vaidya chhu, tamari madad mate ahin j chhu. Kaho, hu kevi rite madad karu?
default_welcome.kn-IN: Namaskara! Naanu Vaidya, nimage sahaaya maadalu illiye iddene. Heli, naanu hege sahaaya maadali?
default_welcome.ml-IN: Namaskkaram! Njaan Vaidya, ningale sahaayikkaan ivide thanne undu. Parayoo, njaan engane sahaayikkaam?
default_welcome.mr-IN: Namaskar! Mi Vaidya, tumchya madatisathi ithech aahe. Sanga, mi kashi madat karu?
default_welcome.pa-IN: Sat Sri Akaal! Mai Vaidya haan, tuhaadi madad layi ithe hi haan. Dasso, main kiven madad karaan?
default_welcome.od-IN: Namaskar! Mu Vaidya, apananka sahajya paayin ethi achhi. Kahantu, mu kemiti sahajya karibi?
default_welcome.en-IN: Hello! I am Vaidya, right here to help you. Tell me, how can I help?

session_expired.hi-IN: Lagta hai is session ka samay poora ho gaya. Koi baat nahi — phir se call kijiye, main yahin hoon.
session_expired.ta-IN: Indha session-in neram mudinjathu pola. Paravaayilla — meendum azhaiyunga, naan ingeye irukkiren.
session_expired.bn-IN: Mone hocche ei session-er somoy sesh hoye geche. Kono byapaar na — abar call korun, ami ekhanei achi.
session_expired.te-IN: Ee session samayam mugisinattu undi. Pravaledu — malli call cheyandi, nenu ikkade unnanu.
session_expired.gu-IN: Em lage chhe ke aa session no samay puro thai gayo. Vandho nahi — fari call karo, hu ahin j chhu.
session_expired.kn-IN: Ee session na samaya mugiyitu anisutte. Paravagilla — matte call maadi, naanu illiye iddene.
session_expired.ml-IN: Ee session-inte samayam theerunnu ennu thonnunnu. Kuzhappamilla — viiNdum vilikkoo, njaan ivide thanne undu.
session_expired.mr-IN: Asha session cha vel sampla asel. Harkat nahi — punha call kara, mi ithech aahe.
session_expired.pa-IN: Lagda hai is session da samaa khatam ho gaya. Koi gall nahi — fir call karo, main ithe hi haan.
session_expired.od-IN: Ei session ra samaya sarigala bhali laguchhi. Kichhi katha nuhe — punarvaar call karantu, mu ethi achhi.
session_expired.en-IN: Looks like this session has expired. No worries — just call again, I'll be right here.

error.hi-IN: Maaf kijiye, abhi thodi takleef ho rahi hai. Ek baar phir bata dijiye, main sun raha hoon.
error.ta-IN: Mannikkavum, ippa konjam idaivu. Innoru murai sollunga, naan ketkiren.
error.bn-IN: Maaf korben, ekhon ektu osubidha hocche. Aar ekbaar bolun, ami shunchi.
error.te-IN: Kshaminchandi, ippudu konchem ibbandi vachindi. Inkokasaari cheppandi, nenu vintunnanu.
error.gu-IN: Maaf karjo, atyaare thodi taklif aavi rahi chhe. Ek vaar fari kaho, hu saambhlu chhu.
error.kn-IN: Kshamisi, eega swalpa tondre aagtaa ide. Inomme heli, naanu keluttiddene.
error.ml-IN: Kshamikku, ippol oru cheriya bhudhimuttu undu. Onnu koodi parayoo, njaan kelkkunnu.
error.mr-IN: Maaf kara, atta thodi adchan yetey. Punha ekada saanga, mi aikto aahe.
error.pa-IN: Maafi, hune thodi dikkat aa rahi hai. Ik vaar fir dasso, main sun riha haan.
error.od-IN: Kshama karantu, ebe tike asubidha heuchhi. Aau thare kahantu, mu shunuchhi.
error.en-IN: Sorry, I'm having a little trouble just now. Tell me once more — I'm listening.

still_working.hi-IN: Bas thoda aur — main aapke liye dekh raha hoon.
still_working.bn-IN: Aro ektu — ami apnar jonyo dekhchi.
still_working.gu-IN: Bas thodu vadhu — hu tamaara mate joi rahyo chhu.
still_working.ml-IN: Innum kurachu koodi — njaan ningalkkuvendi nokkukayaanu.
still_working.mr-IN: Aankhi thodasa — mi tumchyasathi baghat aahe.
still_working.pa-IN: Bas thoda hor — main tuhaade layi dekh riha haan.
still_working.od-IN: Aau tike — mu apananka paayin dekhuchhi.
still_working.en-IN: Just a little longer — I'm looking this up for you.
